---
title: Scène du bar Star Wars
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557605/starwars_20211030_juufm2.png
description: Scène du bar Star Wars
categories: [fanart]
date: 2021-10-30
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557605/starwars_20211030_juufm2.png)
